description: Mau cau hinh voice clone khi dung volume mount ./voice-samples/data/ref_audio:/app/voice_samples
how_to_add_new_voice: Dat file audio moi vao thu muc nay (wav/flac/mp3/m4a/ogg/opus).
Khoi dong lai container neu can roi dung /voice reload.
Bot se tu dong hien voice moi trong /voice list theo ten file.
